title: Online tool to read base64 encoded gzip strings to decompress EF Migration History EDMX
tags: entity framework, csharp, dotnet, ms sql
snippet: MotivationWhile working with EF migrations, I found it quite irritating to view the EDMX that Entity framework produces in the Migration History table. It is not really an issue when you’re already connected to that database context, as some C# code can be written to decompress it and return it a...
